title: BanOffend
description: A ban plugin that lets staff run /offend to ban players, with all messages and offense types configured in config.yml.
body:
**Disclaimer: This is a plugin that is used for Moderation and Catching Cheaters.**

BanOffend offers you a clean reason/offends based ban system to give justice to cheaters and xrayers. You can customize the offends in config.yml and the bans are saved in bans.yml so if you ban someone they will remain banned until the ban temp ban passes.

This plugin is very customizable to fit your preferences.

**Commands**


```
/offend <player> <offend> <time> (you can also type perm in the <time> for permanent ban instead of temporary.)
/unoffend <player>
```

**Config.yml**


```
messages:

  title: "&cYou are banned from this server!"

  banned-on: "&7Banned on: &c{date}"
  banned-by: "&7Banned by: &c{staff}"
  reason: "&7Reason: &c{reason}"
  expires: "&7Expires in: &c{time}"

  permanent: "&7You are &cpermanently &7banned!"

date-format: "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"

offenses:

  hacking:
    reason: "Using hacks"

  spam:
    reason: "Spam"

  abuse:
    reason: "Staff abuse"

  toxic:
    reason: "Toxic behavior"
```

**Permissions**


```
permission: offend.use (for unoffend and offend)
```
